name: Calculadora de Degraus de Concreto
seo_title: Calculadora de Degraus – Degraus e Volume
seo_description: Calcule as dimensões e o volume de concreto para degraus. Insira a elevação total, o comprimento total e a largura para obter o número de degraus e o concreto necessário.
description: Calculadora 1116. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Volume per step: 0.30 m × 0.18 m × 1.2 m = 0.065 m³
Add 10% waste for formwork: 0.65 m³ × 1.10 = 0.72 m³
mistakes: Making risers too tall — building codes typically limit to 18 cm maximum
Not sloping treads slightly (1–2%) for rainwater drainage
Forgetting to include top and bottom landings in the step count
formula_display: Volume per step = tread × riser × width; Total = volume × steps × (1 + waste%)
